item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min “If someone is whistling at the side of you, get rid of them because it’s just spoiling the gam
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min “If someone is whistling at the side of you, get rid of them because it’s just spoiling the games.”
Joe Cullen has urged fans to eject troublemakers after crowd trouble in Sindelfingen.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/cullen-urges-f ans-to-eject-whistlers-after-crowd-trouble/ …
In association with @DiamondXDraws

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min A huge outpour of emotion from Martin Schindler after a nervy deciding leg victory over Damon He
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min A huge outpour of emotion from Martin Schindler after a nervy deciding leg victory over Damon Heta.
The German No.1 started off the match poorly but found enough in the reserves to delight his home fans and book his spot in the last 16.
In association with @DiamondXDraws Mostrar más 55
